_why: Defines the per-turn execution pipeline for AI-OS runtime. Each stage has a trigger, priority, skip condition, failure strategy, latency budget, and token budget. This is the Runtime Decision Engine in executable form.

pipeline.name: RPM Guard
pipeline.failure_strategy: reject turn with user-visible error message
pipeline._why: Must be first. A rejected request costs nothing. A 429 from NIM mid-stream corrupts the session.

pipeline.name: Credential Scrub
pipeline.failure_strategy: pass through without scrubbing, log warning
pipeline._why: Credential exposure to NIM is an irreversible data leak. Prevention must run before any external call.

pipeline.name: Profile Selector
pipeline._why: Parameter optimisation per task class improves quality and reduces token waste. Default profile is always safe.

pipeline.name: Context Budget Enforcer
pipeline.failure_strategy: pass through without truncation, log warning
pipeline._why: Context overflow on NIM Free Tier causes timeout. Proactive truncation is cheaper than a failed request.

pipeline.name: Memory Retrieval
pipeline.skip_condition: no load trigger signal in user message
pipeline.failure_strategy: skip memory, proceed without user context
pipeline._why: User context materially improves personalised answers. Optional — failure degrades personalisation, not correctness.

pipeline.name: Knowledge Retrieval (RAG)
pipeline.skip_condition: no relevant collection loaded OR skip_conditions met
pipeline.failure_strategy: fall back to model knowledge with [verify] flag
pipeline._why: RAG does not consume NIM RPM — it uses OWU's internal vector search. Zero RPM cost makes it always worth attempting when relevant.

pipeline.name: Tool Calls (GitHub / Web Search / Calculator)
pipeline.trigger: routing rules met (see tools section of compiled_prompt_v2.md)
pipeline.skip_condition: routing rules not met OR RPM budget exhausted
pipeline.failure_strategy: acknowledge error, proceed without tool result
pipeline.rpm_cost: 1 per tool call — max 3 tool calls before NIM inference
pipeline.batch_rule: collect all tool results before NIM inference — no partial answer chaining
pipeline._why: Tool results must arrive together to avoid multiple NIM inference calls per turn, which drains RPM quota.

pipeline.name: NIM Inference
pipeline.failure_strategy: surface NIM error to user with retry guidance
pipeline._why: The single inference call must happen exactly once per turn. All context (memory + RAG + tool results) must be assembled before this call.

pipeline.name: Response Quality Monitor
pipeline._why: Quality monitoring is passive — it annotates metadata for the benchmark harness without modifying the response.

failure_modes.nim_429: RPM Guard should prevent this. If reached: surface error, advise 60s wait.
failure_modes.nim_timeout: Context too large or NIM overloaded. Context Budget Enforcer should prevent. If reached: advise retry with shorter input.
failure_modes.tool_error: Acknowledge, state what is missing, proceed with best available.
failure_modes.memory_conflict: Surface conflict to user, request resolution.
failure_modes.rag_low_score: Fall back to model knowledge with [verify] flag.
